name: client-brief-generator
description: Generates a standardized Client Email Draft Doc from a client's website, sales deck, and pitch deck. Produces the canonical brief that the cold-email-generator skill consumes. Uses Apify MCP (rag-web-browser actor, parallel multi-page fetch pattern) to scrape the client's website within MCP's 60s synchronous call window. Supports full generation and section-level refresh.
